user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new position, so that I can define roles within a department
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Position List screen; When I click Add new position and save the details; Then the position is created and appears in the list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view positions with ID, status, department, position, level and task columns, so that I can review the full catalogue of roles
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Position List screen; When the list loads; Then each row shows Position ID, Status, Department, Position, Level and Task

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through the position list, so that I can browse all 444 positions
acceptance_criteria: Given the Position List has many records; When I click next or a page number; Then the corresponding page of positions is displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the position list, so that I see the latest positions
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Position List screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current data
